root_text.an5.141:1.3: Datvā avajānāti, saṁvāsena avajānāti, ādheyyamukho hoti, lolo hoti, mando momūho hoti.
root_text.an5.141:2.7: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, puggalo datvā avajānāti.
root_text.an5.141:3.2: Idha, bhikkhave, puggalo puggalena saddhiṁ saṁvasati dve vā tīṇi vā vassāni.
root_text.an5.141:3.4: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, puggalo saṁvāsena avajānāti.
root_text.an5.141:4.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco puggalo parassa vaṇṇe vā avaṇṇe vā bhāsiyamāne taṁ khippaññeva adhimuccitā hoti.
root_text.an5.141:4.3: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, puggalo ādheyyamukho hoti.
root_text.an5.141:5.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco puggalo ittarasaddho hoti ittarabhattī ittarapemo ittarappasādo.
root_text.an5.141:5.3: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, puggalo lolo hoti.
root_text.an5.141:6.1: Kathañca, bhikkhave, puggalo mando momūho hoti?
root_text.an5.141:6.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco puggalo kusalākusale dhamme na jānāti, sāvajjānavajje dhamme na jānāti, hīnappaṇīte dhamme na jānāti, kaṇhasukkasappaṭibhāge dhamme na jānāti.
root_text.an5.141:6.3: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, puggalo mando momūho hoti.
root_text.an5.141:6.4: Ime kho, bhikkhave, pañca puggalā santo saṁvijjamānā lokasmin”ti.

translation_text.an5.141:1.1: “Mendicants, these five individuals are found in the world.
translation_text.an5.141:1.3: One gives then scorns, one lives together then scorns, one is gullible for gossip, one is impulsive, and one is dull and stupid.
translation_text.an5.141:2.1: And how does an individual give then scorn?
translation_text.an5.141:2.2: It’s when an individual gives an individual robes, almsfood, lodgings, and medicines and supplies for the sick.
translation_text.an5.141:2.6: They give to them, then they scorn them.
translation_text.an5.141:2.7: That’s how an individual gives then scorns.
translation_text.an5.141:3.1: And how does an individual live together then scorn?
translation_text.an5.141:3.2: It’s when an individual lives with someone else for two or three years.
translation_text.an5.141:3.3: They live together with them, then they scorn them.
translation_text.an5.141:3.4: That’s how an individual lives together then scorns.
translation_text.an5.141:4.1: And how is an individual gullible for gossip?
translation_text.an5.141:4.2: It’s when they’re very quick to believe what a certain individual says in praise or criticism of another.
translation_text.an5.141:4.3: That’s how an individual is gullible for gossip.
translation_text.an5.141:5.1: And how is an individual impulsive?
translation_text.an5.141:5.2: It’s when a certain individual is fickle in faith, devotion, fondness, and confidence.
translation_text.an5.141:5.3: That’s how an individual is impulsive.
translation_text.an5.141:6.1: And how is an individual dull and stupid?
translation_text.an5.141:6.2: It’s when they don’t know the difference between qualities that are skillful and unskillful, blameworthy and blameless, inferior and superior, and those on the side of dark and bright.
translation_text.an5.141:6.3: That’s how an individual is dull and stupid.
translation_text.an5.141:6.4: These are the five individuals found in the world.”

variant_text.an5.141:1.3: ādheyyamukho → ādiyyamūkho (bj); ādeyyamukho (sya-all, km); ādiyamukho (pts1ed) | momūho hoti → mando hoti momūho (bj)
